archetypes.name: imprezia evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: imprezia signal changes while pitch context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: pitch boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: pitch handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: integration regression harness
archetypes.trigger: integration behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: inside operator packet
archetypes.trigger: inside output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
